full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #53 (2026-06-05)

PULSE
Health: 0.5566 (C). 1037 wallets, 296 contributors. 48 memos today vs 109 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
46 reward payments, 254530 PFT distributed to 19 contributors. Top earner: raL2kv...Gwzd (48107 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 3,500 PFT. Highest: r4ahFv...5XyU (3,500 PFT). 7-day leader: r4ahFv...5XyU (23,900 PFT, avg 3,414/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rhwiJx...2TaE (62 memos). Fastest new contributor: rU963x...fyUj (6.8 memos/day in 5 days). 19 new wallet(s) this week. 61 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 70.7%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-05-06): 192 transactions from 34 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
